title: left shift for IP addresses not available to non-system users
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE ip_test (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, ip_address VARCHAR(39) NOT NULL, user_type VARCHAR(20) CHECK (user_type IN ('system', 'non-system')));
SELECT * FROM ip_test WHERE user_type = 'non-system' AND INET_ATON(ip_address) BETWEEN INET_ATON('192.168.0.0') AND INET_ATON('192.168.255.255');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ip_test WHERE user_type = 'non-system' AND ip_address IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: left shift operation on IP addresses for non-system users
